text:
# Dynamic Pricing Optimization(POC)  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
Challenge:  
Pricing team received daily competitor and product-rate data in Excel, requiring manual product mapping, competitor selection, and rate-adjustment simulations. Each iteration to evaluate ranking, volume, and margin impact took significant analyst time and created inconsistency across decisions.  
Developed Solution:  
Delivered a deterministic ML-driven pricing engine that uses historical searchbehavior data to predict the likelihood of customers selecting a given product.The solution automates ranking, volume forecasting, and margin estimation, enablingdata-backed rate adjustments instead of manual Excel scenarios.  
Use case learnings –repeatable patterns, real-time pricingoptimisationacross thewider product portfolio.  
logo  
Buy-to-Let mortgage products targeted  
110+  
75%  
Of product-selection captured accurately  
Of the actual TMW's wins were identified correctly  
68%
name: Chunk 11/14

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A financial services organization referenced as the primary client for the Dynamic Pricing Optimization POC. The organization operates in the mortgage sector and utilizes dedicated pricing teams to manage product-rate data and competitor analysis.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
Buy-to-Let mortgage products targeted

raw_entities.name: Dynamic Pricing Optimization POC
raw_entities.description: A proof-of-concept engagement designed to replace manual pricing workflows with an automated, data-driven approach. The solution leverages machine learning to predict customer product selection likelihood and optimize pricing strategies across a broader product portfolio.
context: # Dynamic Pricing Optimization(POC)
Developed Solution: Delivered a deterministic ML-driven pricing engine that uses historical searchbehavior data to predict the likelihood of customers selecting a given product.

raw_entities.name: Manual pricing data processing
raw_entities.description: The client's pricing team faced significant operational inefficiencies due to reliance on manual Excel-based workflows. Daily data handling required extensive analyst time for product mapping, competitor selection, and margin impact evaluation, leading to inconsistent decision-making.
context: Pricing team received daily competitor and product-rate data in Excel, requiring manual product mapping, competitor selection, and rate-adjustment simulations.
Each iteration to evaluate ranking, volume, and margin impact took significant analyst time and created inconsistency across decisions.

raw_entities.name: Excel
raw_entities.description: A legacy data management tool used by the client for manual pricing calculations. The solution was specifically designed to eliminate dependency on this tool for complex rate-adjustment scenarios and manual data handling.
context: Pricing team received daily competitor and product-rate data in Excel
instead of manual Excel scenarios.

raw_entities.name: Automated ranking and volume forecasting
raw_entities.description: The core functional capability of the delivered solution, enabling the automatic calculation of product rankings, sales volume forecasts, and margin estimates without manual analyst intervention. This capability replaces iterative manual simulations with deterministic data-backed adjustments.
context: The solution automates ranking, volume forecasting, and margin estimation
enablingdata-backed rate adjustments instead of manual Excel scenarios.

raw_entities.name: Buy-to-Let mortgage pricing optimization
raw_entities.description: The specific business application where the pricing engine is deployed to optimize rates and product selection for buy-to-let mortgage offerings. This use case demonstrates the solution's ability to identify repeatable patterns and apply real-time pricing optimization across a wider product portfolio.
context: Buy-to-Let mortgage products targeted
Use case learnings –repeatable patterns, real-time pricingoptimisationacross thewider product portfolio.

raw_entities.name: High product selection accuracy
raw_entities.description: The solution achieved a 75% accuracy rate in capturing product selection, significantly reducing decision inconsistency and improving the reliability of pricing recommendations. This quantifiable outcome demonstrates the effectiveness of the automated ML-driven approach over manual methods.
context: 75% Of product-selection captured accurately

raw_entities.name: Market win identification
raw_entities.description: The engine successfully identified 68% of actual Total Market Weight (TMW) wins, demonstrating strong competitive positioning and data-driven market insight generation. This capability directly supports revenue protection and strategic product placement.
context: Of the actual TMW's wins were identified correctly

raw_entities.name: IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
raw_entities.description: A 2025 demonstration event hosted by IBM to showcase the Dynamic Pricing Optimization POC and its capabilities to the Nationwide client. The event served as the platform for presenting the solution's architecture, use case learnings, and quantified performance metrics.
context: Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
